creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
On Sat, 19 Jun 2010 21:55:22 GMT, makc wrote

Hi Max,

> Synopsis: new port: multimedia/sms1xxx-kmod
> Committed. Thanks!
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=143989

Thanks, but you have commited the first version of the port. Could you commit
the updated one (v20100227) ? It is available as a followup in the PR :

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=143989-2-txt&n=/sms1xxx-kmod-port.shar.txt

Thank you very much,
Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
